_meta.title: B6 — A2UI-over-A2A bridge (SPEC-R16) + artifact-feed demo
_meta.author: system-planner
_meta.note: Both planes derived independently: structure from the SPEC-R16/PRD-G5 surface split (mapping / proof / fixture / page / integration); actions from HV-8's three wire obligations + the house demo doctrine (recorded-default, same-gate-in-page, negative controls) + Kim's ratified feed shape.

nodes.label: bridge mapping module (a2ui tools/pipeline/transports/a2a.ts, PRD-D2's ratified home)
envelope <-> DataPart mapping (wrap/unwrap, mimeType-tagged)
nodes.accept: npx vitest run packages/agent-ui/a2ui/src/bridge/bridge.test.ts exits 0: wrap(msgs) yields one DataPart per envelope each carrying metadata.mimeType 'application/a2ui+json'; unwrap(wrap(msgs)) deep-equals msgs in order; a foreign (untagged) part is skipped and reported, never thrown

nodes.label: client-capabilities + extension-URI injection (HV-8)
nodes.accept: same test file: every client->server A2aMessage built by the module carries metadata.a2uiClientCapabilities keyed 'v1.0' with required supportedCatalogIds including 'agent-ui', and extensions[] includes the HV-8 v1.0 extension URI; a message built without the helper FAILS the smoke's caps assertion (negative leg)

nodes.label: bridge round-trip smoke over the a2a loopback channel (SPEC-R16 AC1)
nodes.accept: src/bridge/bridge.test.ts round-trip leg: an A2UI sequence wrapped -> sent over createLoopbackPair() (send one end, receive the other) -> received -> unwrapped is identical (deep-equal, same order) to the un-carried baseline, and validateA2ui over the unwrapped sequence is clean

nodes.label: committed feed fixture (artifact-feed.a2a.jsonl: header pin line + one A2A Message per line; prose turns + >=2 artifact classes from the EXISTING catalog)
nodes.accept: the fixture file exists under a2ui tools/pipeline/fixtures/, line 1 pins {a2a:'0.3.0', a2ui:'v1.0', provenance}, and the standing gate (n3b) passes over it byte-stably (re-serialize == committed line for every line)

nodes.label: standing fixture gate + negative controls (src/bridge/feed-fixture.test.ts)
nodes.accept: npx vitest run packages/agent-ui/a2ui/src/bridge/feed-fixture.test.ts exits 0: every line validateA2a-clean at pin 0.3.0; every a2ui DataPart unwraps and each artifact surface's envelope sequence is validateA2ui-clean against the default catalog; every user-role message carries the HV-8 caps key; AND each failure class (missing mimeType, invalid a2ui payload, missing caps, wrong pin) has a test-local firing negative control the gate REJECTS

nodes.label: derivation lib (site/lib/artifact-feed.ts — parse/validate/classify, no DOM)
nodes.accept: loadFeed(raw) returns ok:false with reasons for a pin/schema-invalid raw; ok:true yields FeedEntry[] classifying prose vs artifact vs handshake data per message, plus an in-page verdict computed by the SAME shipped validators (validateA2a + validateA2ui) — asserted by n4b

nodes.label: derivation jsdom tests (site/lib/artifact-feed.test.ts)
nodes.accept: npx vitest run --project site site/lib/artifact-feed.test.ts exits 0 covering: classification of the committed fixture, handshake extraction, verdict derivation green on the fixture and red on a mutated copy

nodes.label: feed page (site/pages/a2a-artifact-feed.{ts,css} + site/a2a-artifact-feed.html)
nodes.accept: under vite dev/static build: the recorded fixture replays with zero network; text parts render as prose bubbles; each artifact message mounts its OWN createRenderer() host (finalize on ingest end, dispose on reset; prev/next cursor never double-ingests); client messages show an expandable handshake chip with the raw wire JSON; interacting with an artifact control composes-and-displays (never sends) the outgoing A2A message with caps metadata; the verdict line derives from n4a, never hardcoded

nodes.label: browser leg (site/pages/a2a-artifact-feed.browser.test.ts)
nodes.accept: npm run test:browser green on the new leg: artifact bubbles paint REAL ui-* controls (computed display, not jsdom), the verdict chip reads clean on the committed fixture, and a schema-broken raw drives the error panel

nodes.label: serial integration slice (nav card + _page.ts link, a2ui devDep on @agent-ui/a2a, site canon/toc gate re-sync, dist grep, full gates)
nodes.accept: npm run check && npm test green repo-wide; npm run test:browser green; grep of dist/ after vite build finds no proxy mount or key name (SPEC-N2 posture); the site nav/TOC drift gates pass with the new card registered

nodes.label: build-time doc re-sync (a2ui streaming-pipeline LLD C5 row -> realized; a2ui SPEC-R5 realization note)
nodes.accept: the a2ui streaming-pipeline LLD component map shows LLD-C5 realized-by pointing at the built tools/pipeline/transports/a2a.ts in the SAME commit that lands it; no doc row still says 'unbuilt' for a shipped module (context-is-memory gate: reviewer checks the diff)

actions.label: carry one A2UI envelope as one A2A DataPart tagged application/a2ui+json (HV-8 carriage)
recover envelopes from tagged DataParts, tolerating foreign parts without throwing
place a2uiClientCapabilities (version-keyed 'v1.0', required supportedCatalogIds) in every client->server Message.metadata (HV-8)
declare the a2ui v1.0 A2A extension URI on bridge messages (HV-8)
prove the carried sequence is identical and in-order vs the loopback baseline (SPEC-R16 AC1)
commit a replayable mixed feed conversation pinned to A2A 0.3.0 + A2UI v1.0 with >=2 artifact classes composed ONLY from existing catalog types
re-validate the committed fixture on every test run with the shared validators (no fork)
prove the fixture gate bites — one firing negative control per failure class
classify raw feed lines into renderable entries without DOM (testable derivation)
compute the page's validation verdict in-page from the same validators (never a hardcoded badge)
render text parts as prose bubbles in a message timeline
render each a2ui artifact as a LIVE inline surface via a per-message renderer host with full lifecycle (create/ingest/finalize/dispose)
show the capabilities handshake on client messages (expandable raw wire JSON — the teaching surface)
step through the feed (prev/next) without double-ingesting any artifact host
compose-and-display (never send) the outgoing A2A client message when a user interacts with an artifact (recorded posture)
ship the static build zero-network/zero-key; the live arm exists only as a named seam
assert derivation behavior under jsdom
assert real-engine render truth for artifact bubbles
reach the page from site nav/TOC with drift gates green
type-check the new cross-package edge (a2ui tools -> @agent-ui/a2a types, PRD-D2's ratified direction)
keep the a2ui streaming-pipeline family's records true when the bridge ships

edges.why: the smoke exercises wrap/unwrap — it cannot exist before the mapping's exports
the smoke asserts the caps/extension placement the injection helper produces
the fixture gate unwraps DataParts through the SAME mapping (no fork of the carriage logic)
the standing gate reads the committed fixture file
the derivation lib reuses unwrap to classify artifact parts — never a re-spelled mimeType check
the derivation lib is written against the fixture's pinned header + line shape
the jsdom tests assert the lib's exported derivations
the page consumes FeedEntry[]/verdict from the lib (derivation-vs-page split, the arena-replay precedent)
the page composes displayed client messages via the injection helper (a15) — same source as the wire
the browser leg drives the real page module
integration runs the full gate suite — the smoke must exist to be counted green
integration's repo-wide npm test includes the standing fixture gate
integration's browser run includes the new leg; nav/canon re-sync needs the page files landed
doc rows flip to 'realized' only after the integration gates prove the modules real
